feed.title: Hancock County Registry of Deeds
feed.subtitle: No dedicated registry news/RSS feed exists; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official registry page. No dedicated news section; monitors hours/staff/service notices.

entry.title: Page updated: Hancock County Registry of Deeds
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
